prompt:
An anodized aluminum trophy on a clean desk or build bench, designed to celebrate a fully tested and verified CI-parity run. The form should feel sleek and technical, with crisp machined surfaces, stable base geometry, and a subtle sense of software achievement without showing readable text. Nearby hints like a keyboard, test dashboard glow, or cable neatly out of focus can reinforce the theme of validated engineering success.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future engineering aesthetic: soft desk lighting, realistic brushed and anodized metal textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the trophy centered and elegant so it reads as a distinct software-achievement award item.
